data.name: En•Fem•E No. 9:  Reborn
data.detailed_description:
Story:
En-Fem-E No. 9 sees the main character start out as a normal college student. His adoptive parent's relationship is on the rocks and the main character and his father move in with his fathers new mysterious girlfriend. When the father is suddenly called away on important unknown business the manipulative transformation at the hands of his father's new girlfriend begins. Part one wraps up with the main character accompanying his new mistress to Tokyo where he/she falls into the grasp of a nefarious pharmaceutical company with dubious and sinister plans for the main character's future.





Game Features :
Complete, fun, and unexpected plot.
3D per-rendered characters.
Multiple dialogue options and text systems for developing relationships.
Fully realistic environment.
Time progression and inventory management.



Progress point system that increases chance to resist NPC actions.
Outfit and appearance options.
Replay of scenes once unlocked in game.
Beautiful artwork with stunning backgrounds and scenes!
Casual visual novel gameplay.
Engaging dialogue to keep you hooked on the story with dialogue choices.
Great ambient soundtrack.



En-Fem-E No. 9 "Reborn" is the first game of a three game series. Part two of the En-Fem-E No. 9 saga "The Factory" is currently in development.

data.short_description: En-Fem-E No. 9 sees the main character start out as a normal college student. His adoptive parent's relationship is on the rocks and the main character and his father move in with his fathers new mysterious girlfriend.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GT 730
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz+ Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 750
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
